args.comment: Beginning remediation of duplicate-charge billing incident.

args.text: Taking ownership of TCK-2201 duplicate billing charge incident remediation.
billing-api v3.4.1 confirmed live with double_charge_guard enabled — duplicate-charge fix is in production.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we identified a billing error that duplicated a charge on your account. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Jonas, we identified a billing error that duplicated a charge on your account. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Priya, we identified a billing error that duplicated a charge on your account. A refund of $39.98 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three affected orders have been refunded and customers notified. Total refunded: $79.96 (ORD-5501: $19.99, ORD-5502: $19.99, ORD-5503: $39.98). Root cause was a disabled double_charge_guard; billing-api has been redeployed at v3.4.1 with the guard confirmed enabled. See refunds-summary.md for details.
